REPLY TO OPPOS TO MOTION TO STRIKE THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL TORT - BATTERY AND FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES OF PLTF'S COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VASSILIADES, GIORGIOS

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GIORGIOS VASSILIADES' MOTION TO STRIKE THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL TORT BATTERY AND FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FOR PLAINTIFF'S FOR COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S BRIEF RELIES ON STATEMENTS OUTSIDE THE PLEADINGS TO ARGUE THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE ALLEGATIONS, SPECIFICALLY THAT DEFENDANT ACTED IN AN EFFORT TO KNOCK PLAINTIFF DOWN AND IN HOPES OF RUNNING HIM DOWN. OPPOSITION AT PAGE 2 LINE 5 AND PAGE 3 LINE 23. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike The Second Cause Of Action For Intentional Tort Battery And For Punitive Damages For Plntf'S For Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GIORGIOS VASSILIADES' Motion To Strike The Second Cause Of Action For Intentional Tort Battery And For Punitive Damages For Plaintiff's For Complaint IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S BRIEF RELIES ON STATEMENTS OUTSIDE THE PLEADINGS TO ARGUE THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE ALLEGATIONS, SPECIFICALLY THAT DEFENDANT ACTED IN AN EFFORT TO KNOCK PLAINTIFF DOWN AND IN HOPES OF RUNNING HIM DOWN. OPPOSITION AT PAGE 2 LINE 5 AND PAGE 3 LINE 23. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/MS-X)
